auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.signupFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
auth.roleUser: Farmer / user — book machinery, feed, community
auth.roleProvider: Service provider — list equipment for rent or sale

authGate.tagline: Farming community, marketplace, and learning — in one place.

profile.logInToView: Log in to see your profile
profile.logInToViewDesc: Sign in or create an account to view your profile and posts.

app.title: AgroVibes
app.subtitle: Farming community, marketplace, and learning hub — in one place.
app.usingCachedData: Using cached data. Backend may be offline.
app.footer: This is a front-end MVP prototype. To make it production-ready, connect it to a backend (authentication, database, payments, notifications) and deploy on web and mobile.

media.title: Media Sharing & Stories
media.description: Farmers share daily life, practices, and equipment in photo and video form. Consumers follow, like, and learn.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Exchange
knowledge.description: Step-by-step guides, quick tutorials, and space for live Q&A between experienced and new farmers.
knowledge.liveQADesc: In a full version, mentors would schedule live sessions. Farmers can submit questions ahead of time and join via video.
knowledge.guideTitlePlaceholder: e.g. How I manage drip irrigation in summer
knowledge.guideDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe your method, steps, or tips so other farmers can follow.

equipment.title: Equipment Marketplace
equipment.description: Farmers showcase equipment for sale or rental with tutorials and simple scheduling.
equipment.descriptionFarmer: Search registered machinery and send booking requests. Sign up as a service provider to list equipment.
equipment.descriptionProvider: List your machinery and manage requests. Farmers with a user account can search and book nearby equipment.
equipment.emptyFarmerHint: No machinery is listed yet. Check back soon, or ask a provider to register and list equipment.
equipment.emptyProviderHint: No equipment listed yet. Add your first item for rent or sale.
equipment.myListingsDesc: You add machinery here. Farmers use Search & Book to find and request your equipment.

labor.title: Labor Connections
labor.description: Farmers discover skilled workers, and laborers list their skills, availability, and location.
labor.postJobNote: This is a simple front-end prototype. Jobs you add will stay only in your current browser session.

products.title: Fertilizers & Seeds Guidance
products.description: Compare organic and chemical options with clear instructions, benefits, and risks.
products.productNamePlaceholder: e.g. Urea 46% N, Hybrid maize seed
products.benefitsPlaceholder: What does this product help with? Yield, soil health, pest control…
products.risksPlaceholder: Overuse risks, compatibility issues, safety precautions…

sales.title: Direct Farmer-to-Customer Sales
sales.description: Farmers list produce with transparent pricing. Consumers buy directly with minimal middlemen.
sales.cartEmpty: Add some farm products to see them here.

learning.title: Learning Hub & Gamification
learning.description: Courses, best practices, and badges to motivate continuous learning and experimentation.

community.title: Community
community.description: Search for other AgroVibes users and follow them to keep track of their posts.
